If this game is postponed/delayed and played within 48 hours of the originally scheduled start time, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished. If a postponed/cancelled game is not played or is rescheduled further than 48 hours out, the market will resolve to a fair price for each team in accordance with the rules. If the game is declared a tie, the market will resolve to 50/50 for both teams.
